name: Dark rubble stone floor for a shattered keep, 32x32 top-down pixel art tile viewed from approximately 35 degrees, uneven charcoal flagstones in muted #2C2A2A with worn cracked mortar, chipped slab edges, subtle cold blue shadow tint, sparse dust and tiny stone chips, hairline cyan rift cracks scattered asymmetrically, mat painterly pixel, dark gritty Shattered Keep palette, walkable flat ground, no characters, no props, tileable. → Rift-fractured stone floor variant for a shattered keep, 32x32 top-down pixel art tile, dark warm charcoal-grey RGB(44,42,42) base broken by cold blue cyan RGB(123,167,188) and violet RGB(110,90,140) hairline rift fracture overlay, weathered ruined keep floor with magical seam tearing through stone, matte desaturated palette with sparse cyan-violet thread accent, dark gritty serious Shattered Keep mood, walkable flat ground at same elevation as rubble, no characters, no props, tileable.
lower_description: Dark rubble stone floor for a shattered keep, 32x32 top-down pixel art tile viewed from approximately 35 degrees, uneven charcoal flagstones in muted #2C2A2A with worn cracked mortar, chipped slab edges, subtle cold blue shadow tint, sparse dust and tiny stone chips, hairline cyan rift cracks scattered asymmetrically, mat painterly pixel, dark gritty Shattered Keep palette, walkable flat ground, no characters, no props, tileable.
upper_description: Rift-fractured stone floor variant for a shattered keep, 32x32 top-down pixel art tile, dark warm charcoal-grey RGB(44,42,42) base broken by cold blue cyan RGB(123,167,188) and violet RGB(110,90,140) hairline rift fracture overlay, weathered ruined keep floor with magical seam tearing through stone, matte desaturated palette with sparse cyan-violet thread accent, dark gritty serious Shattered Keep mood, walkable flat ground at same elevation as rubble, no characters, no props, tileable.
transition_description: Cold blue cyan rift cracks splitting through ancient flagstones, hairline fracture pattern spreading from the rift boundary onto adjacent rubble, very subtle violet shimmer at the seam edges, magical fracture seam with no height change, asymmetric organic spread, dark gritty Shattered Keep palette, Karar 98 rift cyan and violet accent.

terrain_prompts.transition: Cold blue cyan rift cracks splitting through ancient flagstones, hairline fracture pattern spreading from the rift boundary onto adjacent rubble, very subtle violet shimmer at the seam edges, magical fracture seam with no height change, asymmetric organic spread, dark gritty Shattered Keep palette, Karar 98 rift cyan and violet accent.

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
